chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْبِدَعِ وَ الرَّأْيِ وَ الْمَقَايِيسِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 19 – The innovation, and the opinion, and the analogies

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (186/ 1)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (186/ 1)
text: مَنْ أَتَى ذَا بِدْعَةٍ فَعَظَّمَهُ فَإِنَّمَا يَسْعَى فِي هَدْمِ الْإِسْلَامِ .

en.hubeali: And by this chain, from Muhammad Bin Jamhour, raising it,
‘He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If one comes across an innovation, so appreciates him (sides with him), so rather he has assisted in the demolition of Al-Islam’.
en.sarwar: 3. It is narrated through the same chain of narrators from Muhammad ibn Jumhur in a marfu’ manner from the Messenger of Allah who has said the following. “If one would meet an innovator and considers him great such person has, in fact, the destruction of Islam.”
